title: Non-Esterified Fatty Acids Analysis Protocol
author: John Stack
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y38fyrw

steps.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for NEFA analysis by running a NEFA standard.

Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus a) Pipette 6µL of sample into cuvette. b) Add 225 µL of NEFA Reagent A Mixture. c) Add 75 µL of NEFA Reagent B Mixture. d) Mixture is incubated at 37ºC for 10 minutes e) Absorbance is measured at 560 nm.

substeps.instruction: Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus
Add 225 µL of NEFA Reagent A Mixture.
Add 75 µL of NEFA Reagent B Mixture.
Mixture is incubated at 37ºC for 10 minutes
